download.notes: DEJA-VU.rar was interrupted mid-download at 811597824/3996522166 bytes due to a manifest relative_output_path bug (see decision_log.md), then correctly resumed via HTTP Range on the next run (server returned 206 Partial Content); no data lost or re-downloaded unnecessarily.

extraction.error: ERROR: Unsupported Method (7z x) on every file in both archives
extraction.root_cause: Installed archiver is '7zip' 23.01+dfsg-11, the Debian Free Software Guidelines build; its RAR decompression codec is removed for licensing reasons. It can list RAR/RAR5 archives but cannot decompress them.
